creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #6)
If I can choose I will choose BSD license, but this code is derived from original https://github.com/bejelith/send_rate_policyd which does not have any license (plus later contributors https://github.com/onlime/ratelimit-policyd https://github.com/mpellegrin/ratelimit-policyd) 
None of them set license so I don't know if I can choose any license without consent of the other authors.
